photo_captions: Charles picture of Transport Aug 1[2th Tuesday]
pages.notes: Left edge of page is cut off in scan — text on the left side of most lines is missing. Content appears to be notes from a museum or heritage site visit, describing mining equipment/history (bucket and winding gear, 1881 machinery, horses, water power) and ski/jump records, then a Baroque church and waterfall in a town. 'William noted' and 'lecanter used to play Norwegian after the war' suggest observations about local culture. The right portion of the page has a child's pencil drawing (by Charles) of a vehicle (camper van or bus), captioned 'Charles picture of Transport Aug 1[2th Tuesday]'. The caption continues onto the right page. Aug 12th fell on a Tuesday in 1997 and 2003 within this volume's date range (1989–2003).

[Charles picture of Transpor]t Aug 12th Tuesday

[pencil drawings of vehicles and interior floor plan — no further written text]
photo_captions: Charles picture of Transport Aug 12th Tuesday
pages.notes: Page number 75 visible in top-right corner. The written text is a continuation of the caption from the left page: 't Aug 12th Tuesday'. The rest of the page is filled with pencil drawings by Charles: the upper portion shows a row of vehicles (cars, vans, trucks) seen from the side, and the lower portion appears to be a detailed floor plan or interior layout of the camper van. No place names appear on this page. Aug 12th Tuesday corresponds to 1997 or 2003 within this volume; 1997 is more likely given position in the volume but cannot be confirmed from page content alone.
